name: Dizzy - Queen of Vialattea
description:
You are an Elite Guard of the growing Kingdom of Viatallea, assigned to lay down your life for the Royal family. However, with the King leaving on diplomatic business, The Queen has started to make some moves...

This is optional netori, I'd like to formally apologise to Ky Kiske for this one

Still trying to decide best way to censor that I can actually do

Never looked into Guilty Gear to much, but after reading a lot of the lore and the story, it sounds very interesting. I'm doing the bot from after Guilty Gear ends, when Ky and Dizzy form Viatallea.

I've decided I will be doing an Ibaraki bot. Multiple Bleach bots will be out soon:

expect Retsu Unohana first from bleach bots.

Next will be Bambietta and Candice. Could do Giselle... (Female version)

I've decided the next bleach bot will be Nel (Nelliel Tu Odelschwanck) adult version obviously.

I also want to do Riruka soon.

For Kunaboto:

Jun Tao will be coming soon

Scheherazade from Fate/Grand Order. Except, I'm making her a goddess and she doesn't have relation to the Fate/Grand Order story.

Arisa Gunhale soon as well.

Because Dizzy was the secret bot (one more as well next) I'm adding Byleth and Rindou Kobayashi to the soon list.
